patch.value: Key findings: (1) Default agenda view correctly expands recurring events across 365-day lookahead. (2) Week view anchors to Monday-Sunday. (3) Month view uses full UTC month boundaries. (4) Summary counts accurately segment by-kind (deadline/reminder/event), by-type, by-status, and recurring_events. (5) Event start= field is correct (not start_at=). (6) Calendar defaults to markdown output as designed. (7) --occurrence-limit correctly bounds expansion. (8) Context command integrates agenda data.
Feature: Calendar fully functional with recurrence expansion

Calendar features verified: agenda/day/week/month views, recurring events with weekly/daily/monthly frequencies, by_weekday filters, full-period mode, past mode, --from/--to bounded windows, markdown/toon/json output, --include filters, recurrence lookahead/lookback controls, occurrence limits.
All calendar views produce correct output with proper recurrence expansion

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Evidence: Weekly recurring event (mon|wed|fri) expanded 156 occurrences across agenda view. Day/week/month views show correct UTC boundaries. Bounded agenda with --from -7d --to +7d correctly clips. Occurrence limit of 5 correctly bounds expansion.

patch.value: All calendar views (agenda/day/week/month) tested with recurrence expansion, boundary clipping, output format switching, and occurrence limiting
